name: Dragon Bubble Puzzle Gum
descrip: 'Dragon Bubble Puzzle Gum' is a special kind of gum originally developed and consumed by dragons. Chewing it stimulates the mind, opening the recipient to new avenues of self-improvement. Historically a very rare candy treat, newer production methods have made it possible to manufacture it on a much larger scale, though at a lesser quality. Grants 250 EXP when consumed.
useOutcome: Calmly chewing on the 'Dragon Bubble Puzzle Gum', [AttackerName] can feel their mind expand and grow as their thoughts drift from one new enlightening consideration to another, until eventually, the rather tasty treat has fully dissolved. A strange sensation compared to normal bubble gum...
